properties.tree_location: Right side of house when looking from street
properties.tree_description:
Condition: Poor. At the base and root collar the EastLake Tree Services Arborist found advanced decay:
? Multiple open cavities in the buttress roots, several retaining standing water and debris — indicating
that the wood in the structural root zone is breaking down.
? A vertical cavity in the lower trunk, just above the root flare.
? A fungal conk on the stem, consistent with an internal decay column.
? A codominant union in the upper canopy (two stems of similar size), a structural weak point on a tree
of this size.

Many continued branch failures in a water oak with many targetsReason for Removal:Uncorrectable defect
